title: Ship a Codeberg-first 'when to use Ralph Workflow' conversion asset
why_this_action: Fresh external lanes were already inside overlap or measurement windows, while the shared adoption and competitor artifacts still pointed to a conversion bottleneck from interest to free use. The highest-leverage move that could actually ship right now was a repo-facing evaluator page that answers when Ralph Workflow is the right tool versus chat/editor loops and links back to Codeberg first.

docs_review.what_changed: Added a new evaluator-facing guide for choosing Ralph Workflow versus chat/editor/orchestration alternatives, then linked it into the top-level path from README, START_HERE, and docs/README.
docs_review.why_here: This belongs on repo/docs surfaces because it is a conversion asset for people already evaluating the project, not a site-only SEO wrapper or another off-repo distribution packet.
docs_review.what_was_pruned: Removed the direct README route link to the example first-task page and replaced it with the new higher-leverage choice/fit page. START_HERE also dropped the lower-priority unattended-workflow framing link from the short next-step set.
docs_review.duplication_reduced: The new page centralizes the 'is this for me?' comparison instead of repeating fragments across future replies and packets.
docs_review.why_top_level_is_better: The evaluator path now moves from first run -> task choice -> tool-fit decision -> workflow shape, which makes the Codeberg-first repo journey clearer for people comparing Ralph Workflow against chat/editor-native tools.

expected_outcome: Higher-quality repo evaluation from existing and future traffic, with a clearer Codeberg-first path for developers deciding whether they need a workflow instead of another chat/editor loop.

measurement.primary_metric: Codeberg stars/watchers/forks or issue-quality movement after future distribution sends evaluators into the repo path
measurement.kill_condition: If repo-facing comparison/fit messaging still produces no visible adoption or evaluator-signal movement, replace this with a different conversion asset instead of adding more same-shape docs.

verification: Inspected git diff for README.md, START_HERE.md, docs/README.md, and docs/when-to-use-ralph-workflow.md
